headline: A Look At NetApp (NTAP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Swings
summary: NetApp (NTAP) is back on investor radar after recent share price swings, with the stock last closing at US$101.92. The move has many holders rechecking how current fundamentals line up with recent returns. See our latest analysis for NetApp. Over the past year, NetApp has paired recent share price swings with a 12.75% one year total shareholder return and a 69.42% three year total shareholder return. However, shorter term share price performance has been weaker, suggesting momentum has cooled...
